Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /greenzone to open the window.
Changelog:
Studium Community first pass:
- Adds a default-on Studium Community setting.
- Lists opted-in The Studium characters on the community page with character name, GreenZone version, and personal best weekly GC seals.
- Sends a remove request when the setting is turned off.
